NICAR and IRE hit the Net with two new lists

September 1994
Journalism & NewsroomInvestigative MethodsTechnology

IRE, NICAR, and the University of Missouri have launched two new email discussion lists (NICAR-L and IRE-L) for investigative reporters and journalists using computers for news gathering and analysis.

IRE, NICAR and the University of Missouri have launched two new lists aimed at investigative reporters and journalists who use computers for newsgathering and analysis. NICAR-L and IRE-L aim to provide a discussion forum for journalists and educators interested in investigative and computer-assisted reporting.

To subscribe to NICAR-L, send an e-mail message to "listserv@mizzoul.missouri.edu and include the words "SUBSCRIBENICAR-Lyou name" providing the first and last name your would like to use on the list. To subscribe to the IRE list, simply substitute "IRE-L" for "NICAR-L" on the message line.
